mechanics.excerpt: HISTORY and honor intact Under other circumstances Pryde might have refused but with the Wolf Khan making clear his intent to attack her Clan" holdings she could not afford leave those worlds defended by mere garrison troops_ She accepted hegira; and the Jade Falcons left Coventry without another shot being fired.
